feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Business Rule : How can I round the amount into integer number
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I have a business case in order to round the amount of Salary to integer number by using Business Rule in SuccessFactors to apply for this logic

for example case,

1. If employee has salary in ones position from 0.1 - 2.4 (Rank 1) they would like to round down to zero with no digit

For Example 1

   1.1 If Employee has Salary 101,632.40 THB, They would like to show this amount as 101,630.00 THB

   1.2 If Employee has Salary 101,632.35 THB, They would like to show this amount as 101,630.00 THB

 

2. If employee has salary in ones position from 2.5 - 7.4 (Rank 2) they would like to round to 5 with no digit

For Example2

   2.1 If Employee has Salary 101,632.72 THB, They would like to show this amount as 101,635.00 THB

   2.2 If Employee has Salary 101,635.50 THB, They would like to show this amount as 101,635.00 THB

   2.3 Employee has Salary 101,637.20 THB, They would like to show this amount as 101,635.00 THB

 

3. If employee has salary in ones position from 7.5 (Rank 3) they would like to round to tens position with no digit

For Example 3

   3.1. If Employee has Salary 101,637.50 THB, They would like to show this amount as 101,640.00 THB

  3.2 If Employee has Salary 101,638.50 THB, They would like to show this amount as 101,640.00 THB

 

Thank you in advance

 

SAP SuccessFactors Platform

entry.title: Partial Leave Cancellation in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I hope you're doing well. One of my customers has the following request: An employee applied for a 5-day leave, which was approved by the relevant approvers. However, the employee now wants to cancel 2 days of the approved leave, effectively making it a 3-day leave instead.

Could you please confirm if it's possible to cancel a portion of the leave in SuccessFactors? If so, could you kindly guide me on how to proceed with this request?

Looking forward to your assistance.

entry.title: SuccessFactors Agile Implementation using Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 Has anyone implemented SuccessFactors the Agile way using Cloud ALM. If yes could please share your experience and help us understand how to do it. We have the below queries,

  1. If we use Cloud ALM during fit to standard workshops and capture requirements in ALM, at what point we will be doing configuration workbook discussion and updating the same.
  2. Please share any sample items which are tagged as requirement, User Stories and Tasks with respect to Employee Central module.
  3. Do we have templates to capture detailed requirements for custom extension object like MDF and Integrations requirement document using CPI.
  4. Cloud ALM has the SuccessFactors modules in the scope, how to capture integration requirements or reporting requirements.

Thanks for your help.

 

Regards

Sri

 

@blberger @JanMusil

entry.title: How to conduct employee internal transfer to another legal entity without termination
entry.content:
Hi everyone

we have a legal entity that is now being merged into a different legal entity. I would like to transfer the employees without a termination and rehire so to not create a new employment ID.

The employment ID is mapped to all user accounts and accesses, and generating a new ID would mean we need to create new accounts for all these users. In addition, a termination entry is not really accurate for the situation.

Does anyone have some advice?

Thanks!

Julia

entry.title: Negative Balance Restriction based on future accruals.
entry.content:
Hi All,

As per the current configuration, the balance for a specific time type can go up to -10.

Is it possible to implement a logic where employees can only go into a negative balance provided their leave taken for the year does not exceed their full accrual? This would ensure that by the end of the year, there are no negative postings in their account.

Regards.

SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking

entry.title: Replication Cost Center from S4 Hana (S4HCM version) to Employee Central
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I got the information that cost center replication from S4 Hana is not supported without SAP MDI (Master Data Integration) in latest S4 Hana for HCM.

So I would like to know or anyone can confirm if it is not supported any longer using SAP CPI?

If possible please providing any KBAs related, because I need to communicate this matter with our client.

Regards,
Reza

entry.title: Employee unable to login with SSO in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hello all,

We have one employee that has been unable to log into SuccessFactors via SSO since she came on board with our organization. The user is prompted with this error message every time she attempts to navigate to SuccessFactors.

Our typical troubleshooting methods have not worked thus far, and even in working with our partner we have not been able to determine a cause.  Has anyone ran into an issue similar to this?  It is just one user in the entire organization that this is happening to.

entry.title: Business Rule Trigger to ensure atleast 1 of 3 specific wage types is present in recurring payments
entry.content:
We need to build a business rule that can check onSave that atleast 1 of 3 wage types is present on an Employee's recurring payments.  

Essentially, in simple terms the approach should be 

OnSave
    For Each Wage Type on an Employee record
               Check if WageType 1 is present
               Check if WageType 2 is present
               Check if WageType 3 is present
    If ANY are present, then SAVE otherwise raise an Error stating "WageType 1, WageType 2 or WageType 3 is not present so please correct to ensure one of these WageTypes is present".

Any help would be appreciated.

entry.title: Hide custom fields in position object template
entry.content: Hello SAP Community, I hope you are doing well. From our organization we have created a custom field in the position object, however, this field is displayed in the template. We do not want to see this field in the template, is there any way to hide this custom field so that it is not visible within the template?

entry.title: Hide fields in Current Advances
entry.content:
Hi all,

Please suggest how can we hide the fields i.e., Interest Rate %, Interest type, Recovery mode fields under Current Advances.

Regards

Surya

entry.title: Invalid manager message with off cycle event batch
entry.content:
Dear community, 

we are trying to set up an off cycle event batch to update our job information based on the seniority date of the employee. 

The thing is, we are receiving the following error message when it runs:

The manager {"userDisplayValue":"" userId:"NO_MANAGER"} for user 00010010 does not exist or was not yet hired as of 11/16/2024.

Our employee doesn't have any manager assigned to his profile, but if we assign an employee as a manager, we receive the same error (but mentioning the user id of the manager)

Can you help figuring out how to overcome this?

Thank you

Laura

entry.title: New section in job info
entry.content:
I'm trying to create a new section in Job Info in > Manage Business Configuration but the mandatory fields like Identifier, Section ID, and Based on HRIS Element are not editable. I've already checked the permissions, and it doesn't seem to be a permission issue. Does anyone know if it's possible to create a new section in Job Info, and if so, how to resolve this?

 

Thank you

entry.title: EC Admin Mass Approve Pending Requests
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We have a requirement that HR Admin need to mass approve all the workflows that are not yet approved (status "pending"). HR Admin does not participate in the Workflow as an approver so we can not use the Mass Workflow Approval option that Approvers have under "My Workflow Requests" page. 

Also, in "Manage Workflow Requests" there is no option to handle massively pending workflows.

Any ideas about how this requirement can be satisfied are welcome.

Thank you!

entry.title: Implementing Address Typeahead using SAP Data Quality Services for SuccessFactors Address portlet
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

We are in process of implementing Address Typeahead solution utilizing SAP BTP service SAP Data Quality Management, microservices for location data in SuccessFactors Employee Central Address Information. We are doing some impact assessment before starting the implementation, to check whether this solution will fit for Ericsson landscape or not. We have few queries, need to your help to clarify the same.

 

Q1. For Address Typeahead, The JSON file (SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central - Standard Typeahead Configuration - BEL BRA DEU NLD USA file) with the preconfigured local version mappings was offered by SAP to kick start the implementation. But this file only provide configuration standard data model delivered by SAP for the home address in the country/region specific Succession Data Model (CSF SDM). For our customer, standard configurations were not followed, we have custom configurations in Home address. Is it possible to do this kind of custom configurations in SAP DQM Address Typeahead services by following custom configurations ? I have attached the screenshot of configurations of USA country for your reference.

 

Q2. We have more than 100+ countries configured in our customer SF environment, do we need to do the individual country wise separate mapping in SAP DQM Address Typeahead services configurations? or if few countries follows same configurations then can we utilize the 'default' mapping, instead of country specific separate mapping in SAP DQM services?

 


Q3. We would like to utilize the Address Typeahead solution for all countries, so if we enable the service in SuccessFactors provisioning "Employee Central Address Validation Service" under company setting then this will be enough ? or do we need to configure the 'Address Validation Configuration For Country/Region' under manage data for all countries separately?

 

Q4. How to transport the mapping configurations from one to another environment in SAP DQM? Or do we need to manually configure everything in higher environment again?

entry.title: Can Employee Central be configured to show all info expanded by default?
entry.content: After updating to the new People Profile, sections that were fully visible before now require clicking 'Show More.' Is there a way to configure Employee Central to display all information fully expanded by default? I’ve checked Configure People Profile but couldn’t find an option. Any advice?

entry.title: Import Employee Payroll Run Results fails with error message
entry.content:
Hi experts,

 

we are trying to import employee payroll run results into an instance. The system shows the following error message during validation of the employee payroll run results although they are the same:

1. ???ADMIN_GO_EmployeePayrollRunResults_USER_AND_PERSON_ID_NOT_MATCH???

Can anyone help here why this shows up?

 

Thanks and kind regards,

Daniel

 

@timofrueh

entry.title: Date format document generation EC
entry.content:
Hi Guys, I come up with an issue, Im wondering if you can help.
I want to generate a document to the date format appear like this dd/mm/yyyy (09/12/2024) but now ever with US English, the document it generated in d/mm/yyyy 9/12/2024.

How I can, update this format, to date appear correctly in my document?

Thank you in advance.

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Service Center SAP Document Management service

entry.title: cannot add/edit the value in Job Function with "+" sign
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

Here is my reproducing issue: 

1. Go to Manage Data 

2. Select Position, type the position ID 

3. Under Job Info > Job Function, there is a "+" sign displayed here. 

4. Click Take action > Make correction 
5. Check at the Job Function again but the system not allow to add/edit the values

Anybody knows how to remove this "+" sign? How it happen?

entry.title: Pending Workflows for removed Workflow Group Member
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

Has anyone received feedback on pending workflows for users that has been removed from the workflow group they are a member of? This is during the case when a workflow was initiated prior the user being removed from the workflow group due to cases such as moving to a new role, but tile still remains in their home page due to the workflow remaining on pending.

Currently, there is no option as an end user to completely remove or hide it. They will no longer have access to view the workflow, but it will still remain in their homepage as long as it is in pending status.

This can sometimes cause inconvenience to the previous approver who no longer needs the information in their homepage. I have raise an improvement request to either provide admins option to manually remove these workflows from the user's end or add a new check tool validation to remove workflows for invalid approvers as of check tool run date.

Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence

entry.title: Financial Master Data for SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Until the 2302 version of S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, we had the scope item 4AJ available called "Financial Master Data for SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central". However, this has been deprecated with the release 2308 without a successor scope item. Can someone please explain how to proceed for the integration of financial master data for implementations of newer releases?

Best regards,
Kaiwen

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
